calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment And Permanent Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-25-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment And Permanent Injunction.

Plaintiff People of the State of California's unopposed Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment And Permanent Injunction is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court enters the stipulated judgment and permanent injunction.

Prior to the hearing time, Moving Party shall lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a proposed order quoting the text above verbatim.

Prior to the hearing time, Moving Party must lodge by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org a copy of the complete proposed stipulated final judgment and permanent injunction executed by all relevant parties.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
